sentence.sentence_en: The cup is on the table.
I need to get some rest.
Call me if you need help.
sentence.sentence_pl: Zadzwoń do mnie, jeśli potrzebujesz pomocy.

sentence.sentence_en: I think it's a good idea.
I stayed home because it rained.
I am sorry for being late.
I don't know anything about that.
sentence.sentence_pl: Nic mi o tym nie wiadomo.

sentence.sentence_en: There is nothing in the box.
I go to work by car.
I thought you were at home.
Put the book on the desk.
Have you ever been to Paris?
They live in a big house.
Hello, how can I help you?
It is nice to meet you.
Someone is knocking at the door.
What kind of music do you like?
They are building a new house.
Of course I will help you.
Can I have another cup of tea?
sentence.sentence_pl: Czy mogę prosić o kolejną filiżankę herbaty?

sentence.sentence_en: They have a son and a daughter.
Oh shit, I forgot my wallet.
It is such a beautiful day.
I have been here since 9 AM.
I like to run in the park.
She goes to school every day.
sentence.sentence_pl: Ona chodzi do szkoły każdego dnia.

sentence.sentence_en: At the end of the street.
I want to watch a movie.
I need to see a doctor.
What do you want to eat?

sentence.sentence_pl: Czy mogę prosić o trochę wody?

sentence.sentence_en: I am sorry for being late.
The cat is under the bed.
He has to pay the bill.
I need to change my clothes.
The station is far from here.
Don't hit the ball too hard.
Exercise is good for the body.

sentence.sentence_pl: Nie kłóć się ze swoim bratem.

sentence.sentence_en: Do you want to play a game?

sentence.sentence_pl: Jest zimno, mimo że jest słonecznie.

sentence.sentence_en: I will be able to help you.
New York is a big city.
She lives in a small town.
I am working in the office.
I want to buy a car.
The police officer has a gun.
I want to become a doctor.
He is the captain of the ship.
It is good to be alive.
He earns a living by writing.
What was the cause of the fire?
The king lives in a castle.
What sort of book is this?
I promise I will be there.
He works for a big company.
In the past, things were different.
It is possible to do it.
I like the sound of rain.
At the top of the mountain.
We want to win the game.
I am glad to see you.
Hmm, let me think about it.
sentence.sentence_pl: Hmm, pozwól mi o tym pomyśleć.

sentence.sentence_en: The police are investigating a murder.
The ambulance went to the hospital.
I have a meeting at noon.
